headers.name: Masthead
headers.description: Classic newspaper top bar with bold logo, date line and horizontal category nav

headers.name: Minimal Strip
headers.description: Single-line logo left, nav right, ultra-clean

headers.name: Magazine Banner
headers.description: Large centred logo, coloured top bar, two-row nav

headers.name: Dark Top Bar
headers.description: Dark nav with accent underlines and search icon

headers.name: Broadsheet
headers.description: Full-width date + edition bar above centred masthead logo

heroes.name: Lead Full
heroes.description: Single dominant story: large image left, headline + summary right

heroes.name: Tabloid Grid
heroes.description: Full-width lead image (60%) with stacked secondary stories alongside

heroes.name: Magazine Split
heroes.description: Two equal hero stories side by side with category kickers

heroes.name: Breaking Banner
heroes.description: Full-bleed image with headline overlaid at bottom, ticker strip below

heroes.name: Spotlight
heroes.description: Centred headline over a wide muted image, minimal chrome

midsections.name: Three Column Grid
midsections.description: Three equal story columns with thumbnail, kicker and headline

midsections.name: Two Column Stream
midsections.description: Main story stream left (2/3) with sidebar latest-list right

midsections.name: Search Bar
midsections.description: Prominent search input + category filter chips above story grid

midsections.name: Category Tabs
midsections.description: Horizontal scrollable category tabs each showing their top 3 stories

midsections.name: Magazine Mosaic
midsections.description: Asymmetric masonry grid with one large feature and five smalls

midsections.name: List Digest
midsections.description: Compact numbered list of latest articles, no images, text-first

footers.name: Compact
footers.description: Single row: logo left, nav links centre, copyright right

footers.name: Full Sitemap
footers.description: Four-column link grid with logo and social icons above copyright

footers.name: Dark Branded
footers.description: Dark background, large logo, strapline, categories and socials
